meta.title: Christopher Sands on the GOP Presidential Caucuses in Iowa for CBC
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Christopher Sands joined CBC to discuss the results of the 2012 GOP Iowa Caucuses and what the results may mean for the candidates.
